documentation:
## Aliyun ROS ACS Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as ACS from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-acs';
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.Cluster.attr_worker_ram_role_name
documentation: Attribute WorkerRamRoleName: Worker ram role name.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::ACS::Cluster`, which is used to create an Alibaba Cloud Container Compute Service (ACS) cluster.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosCluster\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-acs-cluster>

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.ClusterProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Cluster`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-acs-cluster>

```
param name

Property name: The name of the cluster. The cluster name can use uppercase and lowercase letters, Chinese characters, numbers, and dashes.

param addons

Property addons: The add-ons to be installed for the cluster.

param cluster_spec

Property clusterSpec: The managed cluster spec. Value: ack.pro.small: Professional hosting cluster, namely: "ACK Pro version cluster". ack.standard: Standard hosting cluster. Default value: ack.pro.small.

param deletion_protection

Property deletionProtection: Specifies whether to enable deletion protection for the cluster. After deletion protection is enabled, the cluster cannot be deleted in the ACK console or by calling API operations. Valid values:true: enables deletion protection for the cluster. false: disables deletion protection for the cluster. Default value: false.

param endpoint_public_access

Property endpointPublicAccess: Whether to enable the public network API Server: true: which means that the public network API Server is open. false: If set to false, the API server on the public network will not be created, only the API server on the private network will be created.Default to false.

param ip_stack

Property ipStack: The IP stack of the cluster.

param kubernetes_version

Property kubernetesVersion: The version of the Kubernetes cluster.

param load_balancer_spec

Property loadBalancerSpec: The specification of the Server Load Balancer instance. Allowed value: slb.s1.small|slb.s2.small|slb.s2.medium|slb.s3.small|slb.s3.medium|slb.s3.large

param logging_type

Property loggingType: The logging type of the cluster. By default, no logging service is used.

param maintenance_window

Property maintenanceWindow: The maintenance window of the cluster.

param pod_v_switch_ids

Property podVSwitchIds: The list of pod vSwitches. For each vSwitch that is allocated to nodes, you must specify at least one pod vSwitch in the same zone. The pod vSwitches cannot be the same as the node vSwitches. We recommend that you set the mask length of the CIDR block to a value no greater than 19 for the pod vSwitches. The pod_vswitch_ids parameter is required when the Terway network plug-in is selected for the cluster.

param resource_group_id

Property resourceGroupId: The ID of resource group.

param service_cidr

Property serviceCidr: The service network segment cannot conflict with the VPC network segment and the container network segment. When the system is selected to automatically create a VPC, the network segment 172.19.0.0/20 is used by default.

param service_discovery_types

Property serviceDiscoveryTypes: Intra-cluster service discovery type, used to specify the service discovery method in the ASK cluster. CoreDNS: To use Kubernetes native standard service discovery component CoreDNS, a set of containers needs to be deployed in the cluster for DNS resolution. By default, two ECI instances with a size of 0.25 Core and 512 MiB are used. PrivateZone: To use Alibaba Cloud PrivateZone products to provide service discovery capabilities, the PrivateZone service needs to be enabled. Default value: off

param sls_project_name

Property slsProjectName: The SLS project name of the cluster. If LoggingType is set to SLS and SlsProjectName is empty, a new Project is created.

param snat_entry

Property snatEntry: Whether to configure SNAT for the network. When a VPC can access the public network environment, set it to false. When an existing VPC cannot access the public network environment: When set to True, SNAT is configured and the public network environment can be accessed at this time. If set to false, it means that SNAT is not configured and the public network environment cannot be accessed at this time. Default to true.

param tags

Property tags: Tag the cluster.

param time_zone

Property timeZone: The time zone of the cluster.

param vpc_id

Property vpcId: VPC ID.

param v_switch_ids

Property vSwitchIds: The IDs of VSwitches. If you leave this property empty, the system automatically creates a VSwitch. Note You must specify both the VpcId and VSwitchIds or leave both of them empty.

param zone_ids

Property zoneIds: The zone IDs of the cluster.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.ClusterProps.name
documentation:
Property name: The name of the cluster.

The cluster name can use uppercase and lowercase letters, Chinese characters, numbers, and dashes.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.ClusterProps.addons
documentation: Property addons: The add-ons to be installed for the cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.ClusterProps.cluster_spec
documentation:
Property clusterSpec: The managed cluster spec.

Value:
ack.pro.small: Professional hosting cluster, namely: "ACK Pro version cluster".
ack.standard: Standard hosting cluster.
Default value: ack.pro.small.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.ClusterProps.deletion_protection
documentation:
Property deletionProtection: Specifies whether to enable deletion protection for the cluster.

After deletion protection is enabled, the cluster cannot be deleted
in the ACK console or by calling API operations. Valid values:true: enables deletion protection for the cluster.
false: disables deletion protection for the cluster.
Default value: false.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.ClusterProps.endpoint_public_access
documentation:
Property endpointPublicAccess: Whether to enable the public network API Server: true: which means that the public network API Server is open.

false: If set to false, the API server on the public network will not be created, only the API server on the private network will be created.Default to false.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.ClusterProps.ip_stack
documentation: Property ipStack: The IP stack of the cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.ClusterProps.kubernetes_version
documentation: Property kubernetesVersion: The version of the Kubernetes cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.ClusterProps.load_balancer_spec
documentation:
Property loadBalancerSpec: The specification of the Server Load Balancer instance.

Allowed value: slb.s1.small|slb.s2.small|slb.s2.medium|slb.s3.small|slb.s3.medium|slb.s3.large

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.ClusterProps.logging_type
documentation:
Property loggingType: The logging type of the cluster.

By default, no logging service is used.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.ClusterProps.maintenance_window
documentation: Property maintenanceWindow: The maintenance window of the cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.ClusterProps.pod_v_switch_ids
documentation:
Property podVSwitchIds: The list of pod vSwitches.

For each vSwitch that is allocated to nodes,
you must specify at least one pod vSwitch in the same zone.
The pod vSwitches cannot be the same as the node vSwitches.
We recommend that you set the mask length of the CIDR block to a value no
greater than 19 for the pod vSwitches.
The pod_vswitch_ids parameter is required when the Terway network
plug-in is selected for the cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.ClusterProps.resource_group_id
documentation: Property resourceGroupId: The ID of resource group.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.ClusterProps.service_cidr
documentation:
Property serviceCidr: The service network segment cannot conflict with the VPC network segment and the container network segment.

When the system is selected to automatically create a VPC, the network segment 172.19.0.0/20 is used by default.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.ClusterProps.service_discovery_types
documentation:
Property serviceDiscoveryTypes: Intra-cluster service discovery type, used to specify the service discovery method in the ASK cluster.

CoreDNS: To use Kubernetes native standard service discovery component CoreDNS,
a set of containers needs to be deployed in the cluster for DNS resolution.
By default, two ECI instances with a size of 0.25 Core and 512 MiB are used.
PrivateZone: To use Alibaba Cloud PrivateZone products to provide service discovery capabilities,
the PrivateZone service needs to be enabled.
Default value: off

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.ClusterProps.sls_project_name
documentation:
Property slsProjectName: The SLS project name of the cluster.

If LoggingType is set to SLS and SlsProjectName is empty, a new Project is created.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.ClusterProps.snat_entry
documentation:
Property snatEntry: Whether to configure SNAT for the network.

When a VPC can access the public network environment, set it to false.
When an existing VPC cannot access the public network environment:
When set to True, SNAT is configured and the public network environment can be accessed at this time.
If set to false, it means that SNAT is not configured and the public network environment cannot be accessed at this time.
Default to true.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.ClusterProps.tags
documentation: Property tags: Tag the cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.ClusterProps.time_zone
documentation: Property timeZone: The time zone of the cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.ClusterProps.vpc_id
documentation: Property vpcId: VPC ID.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.ClusterProps.v_switch_ids
documentation:
Property vSwitchIds: The IDs of VSwitches.

If you leave this property empty, the system automatically creates a VSwitch.
Note You must specify both the VpcId and VSwitchIds or leave both of them empty.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.ClusterProps.zone_ids
documentation: Property zoneIds: The zone IDs of the cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosCluster.name
documentation: :Property: name: The name of the cluster. The cluster name can use uppercase and lowercase letters, Chinese characters, numbers, and dashes.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosCluster.addons
documentation: :Property: addons: The add-ons to be installed for the cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosCluster.cluster_spec
documentation:
:Property:

clusterSpec: The managed cluster spec. Value:
ack.pro.small: Professional hosting cluster, namely: "ACK Pro version cluster".
ack.standard: Standard hosting cluster.
Default value: ack.pro.small.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosCluster.deletion_protection
documentation:
:Property:

deletionProtection: Specifies whether to enable deletion protection for the cluster.
After deletion protection is enabled, the cluster cannot be deleted
in the ACK console or by calling API operations. Valid values:true: enables deletion protection for the cluster.
false: disables deletion protection for the cluster.
Default value: false.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosCluster.endpoint_public_access
documentation:
:Property:

endpointPublicAccess: Whether to enable the public network API Server:
true: which means that the public network API Server is open.
false: If set to false, the API server on the public network will not be created, only the API server on the private network will be created.Default to false.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosCluster.ip_stack
documentation: :Property: ipStack: The IP stack of the cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosCluster.kubernetes_version
documentation: :Property: kubernetesVersion: The version of the Kubernetes cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosCluster.load_balancer_spec
documentation: :Property: loadBalancerSpec: The specification of the Server Load Balancer instance. Allowed value: slb.s1.small|slb.s2.small|slb.s2.medium|slb.s3.small|slb.s3.medium|slb.s3.large

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosCluster.logging_type
documentation: :Property: loggingType: The logging type of the cluster. By default, no logging service is used.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosCluster.maintenance_window
documentation: :Property: maintenanceWindow: The maintenance window of the cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosCluster.pod_v_switch_ids
documentation:
:Property:

podVSwitchIds: The list of pod vSwitches. For each vSwitch that is allocated to nodes,
you must specify at least one pod vSwitch in the same zone.
The pod vSwitches cannot be the same as the node vSwitches.
We recommend that you set the mask length of the CIDR block to a value no
greater than 19 for the pod vSwitches.
The pod_vswitch_ids parameter is required when the Terway network
plug-in is selected for the cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosCluster.resource_group_id
documentation: :Property: resourceGroupId: The ID of resource group.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosCluster.service_cidr
documentation: :Property: serviceCidr: The service network segment cannot conflict with the VPC network segment and the container network segment. When the system is selected to automatically create a VPC, the network segment 172.19.0.0/20 is used by default.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosCluster.service_discovery_types
documentation:
:Property:

serviceDiscoveryTypes: Intra-cluster service discovery type,
used to specify the service discovery method in the ASK cluster.
CoreDNS: To use Kubernetes native standard service discovery component CoreDNS,
a set of containers needs to be deployed in the cluster for DNS resolution.
By default, two ECI instances with a size of 0.25 Core and 512 MiB are used.
PrivateZone: To use Alibaba Cloud PrivateZone products to provide service discovery capabilities,
the PrivateZone service needs to be enabled.
Default value: off

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosCluster.sls_project_name
documentation: :Property: slsProjectName: The SLS project name of the cluster. If LoggingType is set to SLS and SlsProjectName is empty, a new Project is created.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosCluster.snat_entry
documentation:
:Property:

snatEntry: Whether to configure SNAT for the network.
When a VPC can access the public network environment, set it to false.
When an existing VPC cannot access the public network environment:
When set to True, SNAT is configured and the public network environment can be accessed at this time.
If set to false, it means that SNAT is not configured and the public network environment cannot be accessed at this time.
Default to true.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosCluster.MaintenanceWindowProperty.weekly_period
documentation: :Property: weeklyPeriod: The weekly period of the maintenance window.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosCluster.TagsProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param key: true
param value: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosCluster.TagsProperty.key
documentation: :Property: key: Tag key.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosCluster.TagsProperty.value
documentation: :Property: value: Tag value.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::ACS::Cluster`, which is used to create an Alibaba Cloud Container Compute Service (ACS) cluster.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Cluster` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-acs-cluster>

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosClusterProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `RosCluster`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-acs-cluster>

```
param name



param addons



param cluster_spec



param deletion_protection



param endpoint_public_access



param ip_stack



param kubernetes_version



param load_balancer_spec



param logging_type



param maintenance_window



param pod_v_switch_ids



param resource_group_id



param service_cidr



param service_discovery_types



param sls_project_name



param snat_entry



param tags



param time_zone



param vpc_id



param v_switch_ids



param zone_ids

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosClusterProps.name
documentation: :Property: name: The name of the cluster. The cluster name can use uppercase and lowercase letters, Chinese characters, numbers, and dashes.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosClusterProps.addons
documentation: :Property: addons: The add-ons to be installed for the cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosClusterProps.cluster_spec
documentation:
:Property:

clusterSpec: The managed cluster spec. Value:
ack.pro.small: Professional hosting cluster, namely: "ACK Pro version cluster".
ack.standard: Standard hosting cluster.
Default value: ack.pro.small.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosClusterProps.deletion_protection
documentation:
:Property:

deletionProtection: Specifies whether to enable deletion protection for the cluster.
After deletion protection is enabled, the cluster cannot be deleted
in the ACK console or by calling API operations. Valid values:true: enables deletion protection for the cluster.
false: disables deletion protection for the cluster.
Default value: false.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosClusterProps.endpoint_public_access
documentation:
:Property:

endpointPublicAccess: Whether to enable the public network API Server:
true: which means that the public network API Server is open.
false: If set to false, the API server on the public network will not be created, only the API server on the private network will be created.Default to false.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosClusterProps.ip_stack
documentation: :Property: ipStack: The IP stack of the cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosClusterProps.kubernetes_version
documentation: :Property: kubernetesVersion: The version of the Kubernetes cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosClusterProps.load_balancer_spec
documentation: :Property: loadBalancerSpec: The specification of the Server Load Balancer instance. Allowed value: slb.s1.small|slb.s2.small|slb.s2.medium|slb.s3.small|slb.s3.medium|slb.s3.large

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosClusterProps.logging_type
documentation: :Property: loggingType: The logging type of the cluster. By default, no logging service is used.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosClusterProps.maintenance_window
documentation: :Property: maintenanceWindow: The maintenance window of the cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosClusterProps.pod_v_switch_ids
documentation:
:Property:

podVSwitchIds: The list of pod vSwitches. For each vSwitch that is allocated to nodes,
you must specify at least one pod vSwitch in the same zone.
The pod vSwitches cannot be the same as the node vSwitches.
We recommend that you set the mask length of the CIDR block to a value no
greater than 19 for the pod vSwitches.
The pod_vswitch_ids parameter is required when the Terway network
plug-in is selected for the cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosClusterProps.resource_group_id
documentation: :Property: resourceGroupId: The ID of resource group.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosClusterProps.service_cidr
documentation: :Property: serviceCidr: The service network segment cannot conflict with the VPC network segment and the container network segment. When the system is selected to automatically create a VPC, the network segment 172.19.0.0/20 is used by default.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosClusterProps.service_discovery_types
documentation:
:Property:

serviceDiscoveryTypes: Intra-cluster service discovery type,
used to specify the service discovery method in the ASK cluster.
CoreDNS: To use Kubernetes native standard service discovery component CoreDNS,
a set of containers needs to be deployed in the cluster for DNS resolution.
By default, two ECI instances with a size of 0.25 Core and 512 MiB are used.
PrivateZone: To use Alibaba Cloud PrivateZone products to provide service discovery capabilities,
the PrivateZone service needs to be enabled.
Default value: off

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosClusterProps.sls_project_name
documentation: :Property: slsProjectName: The SLS project name of the cluster. If LoggingType is set to SLS and SlsProjectName is empty, a new Project is created.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosClusterProps.snat_entry
documentation:
:Property:

snatEntry: Whether to configure SNAT for the network.
When a VPC can access the public network environment, set it to false.
When an existing VPC cannot access the public network environment:
When set to True, SNAT is configured and the public network environment can be accessed at this time.
If set to false, it means that SNAT is not configured and the public network environment cannot be accessed at this time.
Default to true.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosClusterProps.tags
documentation: :Property: tags: Tag the cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosClusterProps.time_zone
documentation: :Property: timeZone: The time zone of the cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosClusterProps.vpc_id
documentation: :Property: vpcId: VPC ID.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosClusterProps.v_switch_ids
documentation:
:Property:

vSwitchIds: The IDs of VSwitches. If you leave this property empty, the system automatically creates a VSwitch.
Note You must specify both the VpcId and VSwitchIds or leave both of them empty.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acs.RosClusterProps.zone_ids
documentation: :Property: zoneIds: The zone IDs of the cluster.
